judgment.summary: Marvell Technology shows robust growth and profitability, supported by strong AI infrastructure demand, though its valuation reflects high expectations.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 1.1%; next earnings date is 2026-05-27.
positives: Earnings growth 106.3% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 97.9% indicate strong recent performance.
Profit margin 32.6% and operating margin 18.7% demonstrate healthy profitability.
Free cash flow $1.44B TTM provides solid operational cash generation.
Analyst consensus is 'strong_buy' with a mean target of $148.18, suggesting upside potential.
Revenue growth 22.1% YoY and analyst growth estimates for current Q (27.6%) and FY (34.4%) show continued expansion.
negatives: Forward P/E 34.97x and trailing P/E 62.34x indicate a high valuation.
PEG ratio of 2.07 suggests the stock may be overvalued relative to its earnings growth.
Total debt $4.79B exceeds total cash $2.64B, resulting in net debt.
Beta of 2.25 indicates higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: Evercore ISI recently raised Marvell Technology's price target, citing strong demand for AI infrastructure as a key driver. This positive analyst action comes just ahead of the company's next earnings report, which is scheduled for May 27th. Traders should consider the implications of sustained AI demand on Marvell's outlook and how the market will digest the upcoming earnings release.

headlines.title: Evercore ISI Raises Marvell Technology (MRVL) Price Target on Rising AI Infrastructure Demand

examples.body: $MRVL Benzinga 10:23 AM EDT, 05/21/2026 Citigroup Maintains Buy on Marvell Technology, Raises Price Target to $215 +2.07% Citigroup analyst Atif Malik maintain…
